basic_details.job_title: Thanjavur Govt Medical College Hospital Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Counsellor / Psychologist, MPHW Posts
basic_details.short_information: Thanjavur Govt Medical College Hospital has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Counsellor / Psychologist, Multi-Purpose Hospital Worker Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 04-08-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc Psychology/ M.Phil Clinical Psychology/ M.A or M.Sc Psychology with 6 months special training at identified institutions like NIMHANS, 8th Standard Pass
qualification.details: Counsellor / Psychologist: M.Sc Psychology/ M.Phil Clinical Psychology/ M.A or M.Sc Psychology with 6 months special training at identified institutions like NIMHANS Multi-Purpose Hospital Worker: 8th Standard Pass

salary_details.details: Counsellor / Psychologist: Rs.27,000/- Per Month Multi-Purpose Hospital Worker: Rs.11,000/- Per Month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Thanjavur Govt Medical College Hospital Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: thanjavur.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Thanjavur Govt Medical College Hospital Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: thanjavur.nic.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Thanjavur Govt Medical College Hospital recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Thanjavur Govt Medical College Hospital recruitment is 04 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Counsellor / Psychologist post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Counsellor / Psychologist post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Multi-Purpose Hospital Worker position?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required for the Multi-Purpose Hospital Worker position is an 8th Standard Pass.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Counsellor / Psychologist post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Counsellor / Psychologist post is Rs. 27,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Thanjavur Govt Medical College Hospital located?
faq.answer: The Thanjavur Govt Medical College Hospital is located in Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification should be checked for state-specific eligibility criteria, but typically government jobs are open to all eligible Indian citizens.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The links to the official notification and application form are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
